options.A: PS II and NADP reductase enzyme

questions.question: The saturation point of CO2 for C3 plants is beyond ______ µl/l.

options.A: On the inner side of the thylakoid membrane associated with PS II
options.B: On the outer side of the thylakoid membrane
options.D: In the lumen associated with PS I

questions.question: In the Calvin Cycle, how many molecules of ATP and NADPH are required to produce one molecule of glucose?

options.A: Simultaneous application of short and long wavelengths increases the rate of photosynthesis
options.B: Plants grow faster in green light
options.C: CO2 concentration is the only limiting factor
